rulings.Case Title: BOBBY JOE HENSLEY SR et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Appoint Gillian Hensley As Successor-In-Interest To, And Substitute Successor-In-Interest For, Deceased Plaintiff And For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, May 4, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. PLAINTIFF GILLIAN HENSLEY's Motion To Appoint Gillian Hensley As Successor-In-Interest To, And Substitute Successor-In-Interest For BOBBY JOE HENSLEY, Deceased Plaintiff, And For Leave To File First Amended Complaint is granted. No opposition filed. =(220/HEK)
